heroContent: Mirai Technologies — Mumbai's authorised semiconductor distributor — delivers genuine Power MOSFETs, IGBTs, Integrated Circuits, Thyristors, Optocouplers and passive components to procurement teams across Mumbai. Whether you are an OEM, EMS provider, R&D lab or a system integrator in Mumbai's Financial capital & largest electronics market in India, we stock what you need and ship pan-India with full traceability documentation.
introduction: Finding a reliable, authorised electronic component distributor in Mumbai is one of the most critical procurement decisions for any engineering team. Counterfeit components entering the supply chain cause product failures, warranty claims and — in mission-critical applications — safety hazards. Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. We are an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components from global semiconductor brands including STMicroelectronics, Infineon, NXP, ON Semiconductor and Vishay. Our team of 30+ professionals manages relationships with 100+ global manufacturers, ensuring our customers in Mumbai receive factory-traceable, RoHS-compliant components with full manufacturer documentation. We serve OEMs, EMS companies, R&D institutions and defence contractors across India with competitive pricing, low MOQ flexibility and same-day quotations. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Mumbai face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Mumbai and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Mumbai with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Mumbai's Automotive and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Mumbai is a significant industrial centre — Financial capital & largest electronics market in India — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Automotive sector companies in Mumbai require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Mumbai demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Mumbai. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Mumbai-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Mumbai with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. Reach our technical team on WhatsApp at +91 93213 98188 Monday–Saturday, 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM IST.

heroContent: Mirai Technologies — Mumbai's authorised semiconductor distributor — delivers genuine Power MOSFETs, IGBTs, Integrated Circuits, Thyristors, Optocouplers and passive components to procurement teams across Chennai. Whether you are an OEM, EMS provider, R&D lab or a system integrator in Chennai's India's automobile capital, we stock what you need and ship pan-India with full traceability documentation.
introduction: Finding a reliable, authorised electronic component distributor in Chennai is one of the most critical procurement decisions for any engineering team. Counterfeit components entering the supply chain cause product failures, warranty claims and — in mission-critical applications — safety hazards. Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. We are an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components from global semiconductor brands including STMicroelectronics, Infineon, NXP, ON Semiconductor and Vishay. Our team of 30+ professionals manages relationships with 100+ global manufacturers, ensuring our customers in Chennai receive factory-traceable, RoHS-compliant components with full manufacturer documentation. We serve OEMs, EMS companies, R&D institutions and defence contractors across India with competitive pricing, low MOQ flexibility and same-day quotations. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Chennai face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Chennai and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Chennai with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Chennai's Automotive and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Chennai is a significant industrial centre — India's automobile capital; major electronics export hub — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Automotive sector companies in Chennai require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Chennai demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Chennai. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Chennai-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Chennai with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. productCategories:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.

productCategories:

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.

heroContent: Mirai Technologies — Mumbai's authorised semiconductor distributor — delivers genuine Power MOSFETs, IGBTs, Integrated Circuits, Thyristors, Optocouplers and passive components to procurement teams across Nashik. Whether you are an OEM, EMS provider, R&D lab or a system integrator in Nashik's Wines, grapes & industrial estate hub, we stock what you need and ship pan-India with full traceability documentation.
introduction: Finding a reliable, authorised electronic component distributor in Nashik is one of the most critical procurement decisions for any engineering team. Counterfeit components entering the supply chain cause product failures, warranty claims and — in mission-critical applications — safety hazards. Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. We are an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components from global semiconductor brands including STMicroelectronics, Infineon, NXP, ON Semiconductor and Vishay. Our team of 30+ professionals manages relationships with 100+ global manufacturers, ensuring our customers in Nashik receive factory-traceable, RoHS-compliant components with full manufacturer documentation. We serve OEMs, EMS companies, R&D institutions and defence contractors across India with competitive pricing, low MOQ flexibility and same-day quotations. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Nashik face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Nashik and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Nashik with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Nashik's Automotive and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Nashik is a significant industrial centre — Wines, grapes & industrial estate hub — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Automotive sector companies in Nashik require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Nashik demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Nashik. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Nashik-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Nashik with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. Reach our technical team on WhatsApp at +91 93213 98188 Monday–Saturday, 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM IST.

Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. We are an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components from global semiconductor brands including STMicroelectronics, Infineon, NXP, ON Semiconductor and Vishay. Our team of 30+ professionals manages relationships with 100+ global manufacturers, ensuring our customers in Jabalpur receive factory-traceable, RoHS-compliant components with full manufacturer documentation. We serve OEMs, EMS companies, R&D institutions and defence contractors across India with competitive pricing, low MOQ flexibility and same-day quotations. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Jabalpur face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Jabalpur and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Jabalpur with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Jabalpur's Defense and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Jabalpur is a significant industrial centre — Defense ordnance factories; military manufacturing — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Defense sector companies in Jabalpur require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Jabalpur demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Jabalpur. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Jabalpur-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Jabalpur with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. Reach our technical team on WhatsApp at +91 93213 98188 Monday–Saturday, 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM IST.

introduction: Finding a reliable, authorised electronic component distributor in Jodhpur is one of the most critical procurement decisions for any engineering team. Counterfeit components entering the supply chain cause product failures, warranty claims and — in mission-critical applications — safety hazards. Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Jodhpur face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Jodhpur and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Jodhpur with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Jodhpur's Defense and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.

Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Raipur face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. productCategories:

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:

Steel sector companies in Raipur require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Raipur demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.

Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. We are an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components from global semiconductor brands including STMicroelectronics, Infineon, NXP, ON Semiconductor and Vishay. Our team of 30+ professionals manages relationships with 100+ global manufacturers, ensuring our customers in Bikaner receive factory-traceable, RoHS-compliant components with full manufacturer documentation. We serve OEMs, EMS companies, R&D institutions and defence contractors across India with competitive pricing, low MOQ flexibility and same-day quotations. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Bikaner face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Bikaner and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Bikaner with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Bikaner's Food Processing and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Bikaner is a significant industrial centre — Camel products & nuclear research facility — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Food Processing sector companies in Bikaner require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Bikaner demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Bikaner. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Bikaner-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Bikaner with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. Reach our technical team on WhatsApp at +91 93213 98188 Monday–Saturday, 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM IST.

introduction: Finding a reliable, authorised electronic component distributor in Bhilai is one of the most critical procurement decisions for any engineering team. Counterfeit components entering the supply chain cause product failures, warranty claims and — in mission-critical applications — safety hazards. Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. We are an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components from global semiconductor brands including STMicroelectronics, Infineon, NXP, ON Semiconductor and Vishay. Our team of 30+ professionals manages relationships with 100+ global manufacturers, ensuring our customers in Bhilai receive factory-traceable, RoHS-compliant components with full manufacturer documentation. We serve OEMs, EMS companies, R&D institutions and defence contractors across India with competitive pricing, low MOQ flexibility and same-day quotations. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Bhilai face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Bhilai and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Bhilai with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Bhilai's Steel and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Bhilai is a significant industrial centre — India's steel city; Bhilai Steel Plant — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Steel sector companies in Bhilai require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Bhilai demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Bhilai-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Bhilai with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. productCategories:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.

heroContent: Mirai Technologies — Mumbai's authorised semiconductor distributor — delivers genuine Power MOSFETs, IGBTs, Integrated Circuits, Thyristors, Optocouplers and passive components to procurement teams across Jhansi. Whether you are an OEM, EMS provider, R&D lab or a system integrator in Jhansi's Defense corridor, we stock what you need and ship pan-India with full traceability documentation.
introduction: Finding a reliable, authorised electronic component distributor in Jhansi is one of the most critical procurement decisions for any engineering team. Counterfeit components entering the supply chain cause product failures, warranty claims and — in mission-critical applications — safety hazards. Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. We are an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components from global semiconductor brands including STMicroelectronics, Infineon, NXP, ON Semiconductor and Vishay. Our team of 30+ professionals manages relationships with 100+ global manufacturers, ensuring our customers in Jhansi receive factory-traceable, RoHS-compliant components with full manufacturer documentation. We serve OEMs, EMS companies, R&D institutions and defence contractors across India with competitive pricing, low MOQ flexibility and same-day quotations. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Jhansi face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Jhansi and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Jhansi with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Jhansi's Defense and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Jhansi is a significant industrial centre — Defense corridor; railway workshops — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Defense sector companies in Jhansi require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Jhansi demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Jhansi. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Jhansi-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Jhansi with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. Reach our technical team on WhatsApp at +91 93213 98188 Monday–Saturday, 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM IST.

productCategories:

whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Jalgaon face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Jalgaon and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Jalgaon's Agriculture and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Jalgaon is a significant industrial centre — Banana export & gold market — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Agriculture sector companies in Jalgaon require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Jalgaon demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Jalgaon. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Jalgaon-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Jalgaon with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. introduction: Finding a reliable, authorised electronic component distributor in Tirupati is one of the most critical procurement decisions for any engineering team. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Tirupati face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Tirupati and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Tirupati's Tourism and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Tirupati is a significant industrial centre — Religious tourism & electronics manufacturing — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Tourism sector companies in Tirupati require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Tirupati demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Tirupati. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Tirupati-based entity.

introduction: Finding a reliable, authorised electronic component distributor in Bhavnagar is one of the most critical procurement decisions for any engineering team. Counterfeit components entering the supply chain cause product failures, warranty claims and — in mission-critical applications — safety hazards. Mirai Technologies, established in 1999 and headquartered in Mumbai, bridges that gap. We are an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components from global semiconductor brands including STMicroelectronics, Infineon, NXP, ON Semiconductor and Vishay. Our team of 30+ professionals manages relationships with 100+ global manufacturers, ensuring our customers in Bhavnagar receive factory-traceable, RoHS-compliant components with full manufacturer documentation. We serve OEMs, EMS companies, R&D institutions and defence contractors across India with competitive pricing, low MOQ flexibility and same-day quotations. Call us at +91 93213 98188 or write to sales@miraitechnologies.net to get started.
whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Bhavnagar face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. Mirai Technologies was built to solve exactly these problems. Since 1999, we have served companies in Bhavnagar and across India's industrial corridors — from automotive OEMs requiring IGBT modules for motor drives, to power electronics manufacturers sourcing Power MOSFETs for inverter designs. Our core advantages: (1) 100% genuine, factory-traceable components from authorised manufacturer channels. (2) Competitive pricing with transparent GST invoicing — critical for B2B procurement compliance. (3) Engineering support team available on WhatsApp and email to assist with cross-reference, datasheet review and application suitability checks. (4) Export capability to Nepal, Bangladesh, Saudi Arabia, Tanzania and Russia for companies in Bhavnagar with global supply chains. Contact us: +91 93213 98188 | sales@miraitechnologies.net.
productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Bhavnagar's Ship Breaking and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Bhavnagar is a significant industrial centre — Ship breaking & diamond polishing — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Ship Breaking sector companies in Bhavnagar require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Bhavnagar demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Bhavnagar. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Bhavnagar-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Bhavnagar with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. whyMirai: Procurement engineers in Amravati face a consistent challenge: long lead times from distributors who carry limited stock, inflated prices from grey-market traders, and zero post-sales technical support. productCategories:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.

productCategories:
Our component portfolio covers every major category demanded by Loni's Manufacturing and allied industries:

POWER MOSFETs: IRFP4668 (200V/130A, TO-247), IRFP460 (500V/20A, TO-247), STP55NF06 (60V/55A, TO-220), STW4N150 (1500V/4A, TO-247), F4N65 (650V/4A, ITO-220AB) and hundreds of other N/P-Channel MOSFET types covering voltage ratings from 30V to 1500V — ideal for motor drives, SMPS, solar inverters and industrial UPS.

IGBTs: High-voltage IGBT transistors (600V–1700V) for inverter drives, welding equipment, traction and renewable energy converters, supplied from Infineon and STMicroelectronics authorised channels.

INTEGRATED CIRCUITS: Logic gates (CD4011BE, HEF4049BT), comparators (LM339L), op-amps (LM358L), 7-segment driver ICs (ULN2003), RTC ICs (DS1307, PCF85163T), microcontrollers (STM8S003F3P6TR) — from NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics and UTC.

DIODES & RECTIFIERS: Bridge rectifiers (MB6S, MB10S), Zener diodes, Schottky diodes, fast-recovery diodes across voltage ratings 50V–1000V.

OPTOCOUPLERS & TRANSISTORS: 4N33M optocouplers, PC817 series; MJE2955T PNP power transistors; NTC thermistors (10D11) for inrush current limiting.

All components ship with original manufacturer packaging, datasheet and Certificate of Conformance.
industriesWeServe:
Loni is a significant industrial centre — Industrial suburb near Delhi NCR — creating consistent demand for high-quality electronic components across multiple segments:

Manufacturing sector companies in Loni require Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for motor control, variable frequency drives and power conversion equipment. Telecom and IT infrastructure companies need reliable ICs, logic gates and microcontrollers for embedded system design and PCB assembly. Industrial automation firms and PLC manufacturers depend on optocouplers for galvanic isolation between signal and power circuits. Power electronics companies in the region need high-voltage bridge rectifiers and thyristors for AC-DC conversion and soft-starter designs. Defence and aerospace units in and around Loni demand MIL-spec equivalents with full traceability — Mirai Technologies provides origin documentation for all supplied components. R&D laboratories and engineering colleges also source prototyping components from us at no-MOQ and single-piece pricing.
whyAuthorisedDistributor: India's electronic component market is estimated at over ₹1.5 lakh crore and growing at 15%+ annually (ELCINA 2024 data). However, counterfeit components remain a ₹3,000 crore problem plaguing procurement teams who rely on open-market traders. An authorised distributor like Mirai Technologies provides: (a) Factory-authorised supply chain — components traceable to the manufacturer's lot number and date code. (b) RoHS & REACH compliance documentation — essential for export to Europe, US and Gulf markets. (c) ESD-safe packaging — preventing electrostatic damage during transit to Loni. (d) Manufacturer warranty support — failed components replaced through OEM channels, not discarded. (e) GST-compliant invoicing — enabling smooth input tax credit for your Loni-based entity.
technicalSupport: Mirai Technologies' engineering support team assists procurement engineers in Loni with: component cross-referencing (finding equivalent parts when a part number is obsolete or unavailable), datasheet interpretation for voltage/current derating in specific application environments, package conversion advice (e.g., through-hole TO-220 to SMD D2PAK), REACH/RoHS compliance verification, and BOM (Bill of Materials) optimisation for cost reduction. Reach our technical team on WhatsApp at +91 93213 98188 Monday–Saturday, 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM IST.

faqs.q: Do you supply electronic components to Loni?
faqs.a: Yes. Mirai Technologies ships pan-India including to all areas of Loni and Uttar Pradesh. We use professional courier partners with ESD-safe packaging. Most orders within Maharashtra reach in 1-2 days; other states typically 2-4 business days. Contact us at +91 93213 98188 for express delivery options.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for Power MOSFETs delivered to Loni?
faqs.a: Mirai Technologies has no fixed minimum order quantity for most components. We supply from single-piece prototype quantities to bulk production orders. Pricing is tiered — higher quantities receive better per-unit pricing. Send your BOM to sales@miraitechnologies.net and we will revert with a volume-based price sheet within 2 business hours.

faqs.q: Are you an authorised distributor or an open-market trader in Loni?
faqs.a: Mirai Technologies is an authorised stockist and distributor of Active & Passive Electronic Components established since 1999. We source directly from manufacturers and their authorised global distribution networks — not from open market or grey channels. All components come with original manufacturer packaging, date codes and Certificate of Conformance. We do not supply re-reeled, re-marked or counterfeit parts.

faqs.q: Which semiconductor brands do you distribute in Loni?
faqs.a: We distribute components from STMicroelectronics, Infineon Technologies, NXP Semiconductors, ON Semiconductor (onsemi), Vishay, Rohm Semiconductor, International Rectifier (IR), UTC Unisonic Technologies, Texas Instruments, Microchip Technology and others. If you need a specific manufacturer's components for your Loni facility, contact us at +91 93213 98188 to check authorisation and availability.

faqs.q: Do you provide RoHS and REACH compliance documentation for components shipped to Loni?
faqs.a: Yes. RoHS (Restriction of Hazardous Substances) and REACH compliance documentation is available for all components we supply. This is essential for companies in Loni that export products to Europe, USA, Japan or Gulf markets. We also provide manufacturer's Certificate of Conformance, datasheet, and country-of-origin documentation on request.
